summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing for EN/FR language translation feature. All 14 test requirements passed. The language toggle in sidebar works correctly, and all 9 pages translate properly between English and French.

language_toggle.details: Toggle button (data-testid='language-toggle') switches between EN and FR correctly

sidebar_navigation.en: PASS - All 9 navigation items translated correctly
sidebar_navigation.fr: PASS - All 9 navigation items translated correctly

operator_panel.visibility: PASS - Visible on desktop at x=1616, hidden on mobile (responsive design)

footer.en: PASS - Note: 'A good industrial website does not sell. It reduces uncertainty.'
footer.fr: PASS - Note: 'Un bon site industriel ne vend pas. Il réduit l'incertitude.'

test_results.language_persistence: PASS - Language choice persists across page navigation via localStorage

critical_code_review_comments: i18n implementation using react-i18next is well structured with proper JSON locale files
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Language preference is correctly persisted in localStorage
context_for_next_testing_agent: All EN/FR translation features are working correctly. The app uses react-i18next with locale files at /app/frontend/src/i18n/locales/. The language toggle (data-testid='language-toggle') is located in the Sidebar component. Language preference persists via localStorage.
